description: A horizontal strip of colorful 'tiles' representing different trip types or categories. Each tile includes an icon, a title, a tag link, and an 'Explore' CTA, designed to guide users to specific trip listings.

fields.description: Four tiles fit the strip best.
The name or title of this tile.
fields.name: title
fields.title: Title

fields.description: Pick a trip tag. Link auto-points to /trips?tag=<slug>.
fields.name: tag
fields.title: Trip Tag

fields.description: Call-to-action. The text label is always shown. The URL is only used when no Trip Tag is selected above.
fields.name: cta
fields.title: CTA

fields.description: Choose the theme color for this tile.
fields.name: color
fields.title: Bubble Color

fields.description: Select the icon that best represents this tile.
fields.name: icon
fields.title: Icon

fields.name: items
fields.title: Category Tiles

name: Home Categories Strip
